actionable_feedback: Document time zone and clock synchronization tolerance (+/-1 min) in both the workbook (Timeline sheet header) and runbook (Assumptions/Uncertainties).

Add a Tag_Change_Diff sheet with: tag, old_value, new_value, engineering_unit, timestamp, writer/source, evidence_ref. Include at least C240_REFLUX_SP 1.80->1.20 and C240_REBOILER_LIMIT 8.4->9.5 MW with timestamps.
Create a Safety_Margins sheet with labeled charts (units: MW, bar), threshold lines/bands, and callouts aligning breach intervals to timeline events.

Provide an ATTACK_ICS_Mapping sheet listing technique ID, name, tactic, justification, and explicit evidence linkage (timeline row/cell or log reference). Only include techniques directly supported by evidence; keep T0859 (Valid Accounts) and T0836 (Modify Parameter); include T0881 (Service Stop) only if the historian service disablement is evidenced with source; remove or mark as 'not claimed' T0880 (Loss of Safety) and T0878 (Alarm Suppression) unless you can cite concrete evidence.

Make restart gates explicit and measurable in the runbook: restore C240_REFLUX_SP=1.80; ensure C240_REBOILER_LIMIT<=8.4 MW; overhead valve mode=Auto verified; historian service account restored and validated; SIS status independent/healthy with proof-check references; confirm console privileges corrected; document engineering credential containment (disable/rotate) after evidence capture.
Add clear cross-references in the runbook to workbook cells/rows (e.g., Timeline!B12) where claims are supported.

State zoning/allowed flows briefly (per site 62443 model) showing that containment actions respect zone boundaries; reiterate prohibition of live network scans and specify offline/air-gapped tooling for analysis.
Provide CSV exports for each workbook sheet (e.g., [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] Tag_Change_Diff.csv) to allow preview when xlsx parsers are unavailable.

feedback_summary: Strong reconstruction narrative and safety-first orientation. However, ATT&CK for ICS mapping is under-justified in visible materials, and several verification gates and documentation details are implied but not explicit. Spreadsheet visuals and mapping sheet cannot be verified from preview; runbook preview omits explicit, measurable restart gates and timekeeping assumptions.

limitations_observed: xlsx preview unavailable; runbook preview truncated.
scoring_inconsistency_notes: Grader output lists ri_4 as failed while other sections imply pass; resolve by strengthening ATT&CK mapping justifications or removing unsupported techniques.

raw_llm_output.suggested_revision: Enhance evidentiary rigor and operator-facing clarity: explicitly state timekeeping assumptions; add Tag_Change_Diff and Safety_Margins visuals with thresholds; include an ATT&CK for ICS mapping table with per-technique justifications tied to specific timeline cells; and enumerate concrete restart gates (setpoints/limits, valve mode, historian integrity, SIS independence). Include CSV fallbacks for each workbook sheet to improve verifiability in limited environments, and prune any ATT&CK techniques lacking direct support.
